84:
SELECT first_name, District
FROM (
  WITH admin_names AS (
    SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools
  ),
  name_counts AS (
    SELECT first_name, District, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM admin_names
    WHERE first_name IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY first_name, District
  ),
  total_counts AS (
    SELECT first_name, SUM(cnt) AS total_cnt
    FROM name_counts
    GROUP BY first_name
  ),
  top_names AS (
    SELECT first_name
    FROM total_counts
    ORDER BY total_cnt DESC
    LIMIT 2
  ),
  top_districts AS (
    SELECT nc.first_name, nc.District
    FROM name_counts nc
    JOIN top_names tn ON nc.first_name = tn.first_name
    WHERE nc.cnt = (
      SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM name_counts WHERE first_name = nc.first_name
    )
  )
  SELECT first_name, District
  FROM top_districts
  ORDER BY (SELECT SUM(cnt) FROM name_counts WHERE first_name = top_districts.first_name) DESC
);	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT a.account_id, (m.max_salary - l.A11) AS gap
FROM (
    SELECT d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN (
        SELECT client_id, district_id
        FROM client
        WHERE gender = 'F'
        ORDER BY birth_date ASC
        LIMIT 1
    ) f ON d.client_id = f.client_id
) a
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT district_id, A11
    FROM district
    WHERE district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id
        FROM client
        WHERE gender = 'F'
        ORDER BY birth_date ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
    ORDER BY A11 ASC
    LIMIT 1
) l
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_salary FROM district
) m;	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT CAST(max_pair.cnt AS REAL) * 100.0 / total_bonds.total AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT elem1, elem2, cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT elem1, elem2, COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM (
            SELECT b.bond_id,
                   LEAST(a.element, a2.element) AS elem1,
                   GREATEST(a.element, a2.element) AS elem2
            FROM bond b
            JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
            JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id
            JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        )
        GROUP BY elem1, elem2
    )
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS max_pair,
(
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM bond
) AS total_bonds;	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      THEN 'Mostly carcinogenic'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      THEN 'Mostly non carcinogenic'
    ELSE 'Equal'
  END AS result
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
  FROM atom a
  WHERE a.element = 'ca'
) AS ca_mols
JOIN molecule m ON ca_mols.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT element_name FROM (
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN element='cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
    WHEN element='c' THEN 'Carbon'
    WHEN element='h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
    WHEN element='o' THEN 'Oxygen'
    WHEN element='s' THEN 'Sulfur'
    WHEN element='n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
    WHEN element='p' THEN 'Phosphorus'
    WHEN element='na' THEN 'Sodium'
    WHEN element='br' THEN 'Bromine'
    WHEN element='f' THEN 'Fluorine'
    WHEN element='i' THEN 'Iodine'
    WHEN element='sn' THEN 'Tin'
    WHEN element='pb' THEN 'Lead'
    WHEN element='te' THEN 'Tellurium'
    WHEN element='ca' THEN 'Calcium'
    ELSE element
  END AS element_name
  FROM atom
  WHERE atom_id='10' AND molecule_id='TR001'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT CASE
    WHEN element='cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
    WHEN element='c' THEN 'Carbon'
    WHEN element='h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
    WHEN element='o' THEN 'Oxygen'
    WHEN element='s' THEN 'Sulfur'
    WHEN element='n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
    WHEN element='p' THEN 'Phosphorus'
    WHEN element='na' THEN 'Sodium'
    WHEN element='br' THEN 'Bromine'
    WHEN element='f' THEN 'Fluorine'
    WHEN element='i' THEN 'Iodine'
    WHEN element='sn' THEN 'Tin'
    WHEN element='pb' THEN 'Lead'
    WHEN element='te' THEN 'Tellurium'
    WHEN element='ca' THEN 'Calcium'
    ELSE element
  END AS element_name

);	----- bird -----	toxicology

637:
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM (
    WITH user_posts AS (
        SELECT p.Tags
        FROM posts p
        JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
        WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
          AND p.CommentCount = 0
    ),
    tag_list AS (
        SELECT replace(replace(Tags, '<', ''), '>', '') AS tags_clean
        FROM user_posts
    ),
    split AS (
        SELECT
            CASE WHEN instr(tags_clean, '><') > 0
                 THEN substr(tags_clean, 1, instr(tags_clean, '><')-1)
                 ELSE tags_clean END AS tag,
            CASE WHEN instr(tags_clean, '><') > 0
                 THEN substr(tags_clean, instr(tags_clean, '><')+2)
                 ELSE '' END AS rest
        FROM tag_list
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            CASE WHEN instr(rest, '><') > 0
                 THEN substr(rest, 1, instr(rest, '><')-1)
                 ELSE rest END AS tag,
            CASE WHEN instr(rest, '><') > 0
                 THEN substr(rest, instr(rest, '><')+2)
                 ELSE '' END AS rest
        FROM split
        WHERE rest <> ''
    )
    SELECT tag FROM split
);	----- bird -----	codebase_community

SELECT
  c.year,
  AVG(
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600.0 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60.0 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.time,10,3) AS INTEGER)/1000.0
  ) AS avg_seconds
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN (
  SELECT sp.year, sp.driverId
  FROM (
    SELECT r.year, ds.driverId, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.year < 1975
    GROUP BY r.year, ds.driverId
  ) sp
  JOIN (
    SELECT year, MAX(total_points) AS max_points
    FROM (
      SELECT r.year, ds.driverId, SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
      FROM driverStandings ds
      JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
      WHERE r.year < 1975
      GROUP BY r.year, ds.driverId
    )
    GROUP BY year
  ) mp ON sp.year = mp.year AND sp.total_points = mp.max_points
) c ON ra.year = c.year AND r.driverId = c.driverId
WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.year;	----- bird -----	formula_1

    UNION ALL

    UNION ALL

    UNION ALL

    UNION ALL

    UNION ALL

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS in_male,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS out_male,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        THEN 'In-patient'
        ELSE 'Outpatient'
    END AS more_frequent,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ratio,
    ((CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) -
      CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL)) /
     NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100 AS deviation_percent
FROM Patient;	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

1453:
SELECT ep.event_name
FROM (
    SELECT ev.event_id, ev.event_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_cost
    FROM event ev
    JOIN budget b ON ev.event_id = b.link_to_event
    JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
    WHERE b.category = 'Parking'
    GROUP BY ev.event_id, ev.event_name
) ep
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT SUM(total_cost)/COUNT(*) AS avg_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT ev.event_id, SUM(e.cost) AS total_cost
        FROM event ev
        JOIN budget b ON ev.event_id = b.link_to_event
        JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
        WHERE b.category = 'Parking'
        GROUP BY ev.event_id
    )
) ap
WHERE ep.total_cost < ap.avg_cost;	----- bird -----	student_club

SELECT
  (SELECT min_total FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, MIN(t.total_consumption) AS min_total
     FROM (
       SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM yearmonth y
       WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
       GROUP BY y.CustomerID
     ) t
     JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY c.Segment
   ) WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT min_total FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, MIN(t.total_consumption) AS min_total
     FROM (
       SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM yearmonth y
       WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
       GROUP BY y.CustomerID
     ) t
     JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY c.Segment
   ) WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM,
  (SELECT min_total FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, MIN(t.total_consumption) AS min_total
     FROM (
       SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM yearmonth y
       WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
       GROUP BY y.CustomerID
     ) t
     JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY c.Segment
   ) WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT min_total FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, MIN(t.total_consumption) AS min_total
     FROM (
       SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM yearmonth y
       WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
       GROUP BY y.CustomerID
     ) t
     JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY c.Segment
   ) WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT min_total FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, MIN(t.total_consumption) AS min_total
     FROM (
       SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM yearmonth y
       WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
       GROUP BY y.CustomerID
     ) t
     JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
     GROUP BY c.Segment
   ) WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT min_total FROM (
     SELECT c.Segment, MIN(t.total_consumption) AS min_total
     FROM (
       SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
       FROM yearmonth y
       WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
       GROUP BY y.CustomerID
     ) t

   ) WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
WITH seg_year AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
seg_change AS (
    SELECT s.Segment,
           COALESCE(t2013.total,0) AS cons2013,
           COALESCE(t2012.total,0) AS cons2012,
           ((COALESCE(t2013.total,0) - COALESCE(t2012.total,0)) / COALESCE(t2013.total,1)) * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (SELECT DISTINCT Segment FROM seg_year) s
    LEFT JOIN seg_year t2013 ON s.Segment = t2013.Segment AND t2013.yr = '2013'
    LEFT JOIN seg_year t2012 ON s.Segment = t2012.Segment AND t2012.yr = '2012'
)
SELECT Segment, pct
FROM seg_change
WHERE pct = (SELECT MAX(pct) FROM seg_change)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct
FROM seg_change
WHERE pct = (SELECT MIN(pct) FROM seg_change);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
